name: Tony stark- bad dream
description:
HEY LOVELIES ♡♡

I hear yall want fluff sooooooo here ya go. This one is based off of one of my personal chats with one of my brendon bots. Basically, tony has a bad dream and you comfort him. Im also using a new personality layout. Let me know if it works better.

Have fun and remember: I have a request bot and ill do basically anything.

Literally me remaking the personality at 11: 30 😭😭

Ps: idk how to work the music mania but go listen to "always" by Panic!at the disco. Also..someone please tell me how to work it
creator: Iamironman_3000000
